channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NITTAGELA] Nitta Gelatin Board to meet May 2, 2026 for FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Nitta Gelatin India Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Saturday, May 2, 2026. The meeting, to be held via video conferencing, is primarily scheduled to consider and approve the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Furthermore, the Board will also discuss and recommend a dividend, if any, for the financial year. This announcement is made in accordance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 2, 2026, via video conference.
  • To approve Q4 and full year FY26 audited financial results.
  • To consider recommending dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Meeting is in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NITTA GELATIN INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [EMBASSY] Embassy REIT to host Q4/FY26 earnings call on April 27, 2026
item.description:
Embassy Office Parks REIT's Manager, Embassy Office Parks Management Services Private Limited, announced an earnings conference call for Monday, April 27, 2026, at 1700 Hrs IST. The call will discuss the REIT's financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Global dial-in details are provided for participation, with stakeholders advised to dial in 10-15 minutes prior. A playback and transcript of the call will be available on the Investor Relations section of Embassy REIT's website shortly after the event. A pre-registration link (Diamond Pass) is also available to avoid wait times.

  • Embassy REIT to host Q4/FY26 earnings conference call.
  • Call scheduled for April 27, 2026, at 1700 Hrs IST.
  • Discussion will cover Q4 and full-year financial results.
  • Dial-in details and website access for playback provided.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Embassy Office Parks REIT | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NELCO] Nelco Board to meet on April 20, 2026 for Q4/FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Nelco Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Monday, April 20, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will discuss and potentially recommend a dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. In compliance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading, the trading window for dealing in Nelco's securities has been closed from March 25, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the financial results are disclosed to the Stock Exchanges.

  • Nelco Board meeting scheduled for April 20, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and full-year FY26 audited results.
  • Board will also consider recommending a dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from March 25, 2026 until results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NELCO LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AMTL] Advance Metering: Chairman Pranav Ranade passes away, held 5.32% stake
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Advance Metering Technology Ltd announced the sudden demise of Mr. Pranav Kumar Ranade on April 13, 2026. Mr. Ranade served as the Promoter, Chairman, and Whole Time Director, having been appointed to the latter roles on November 9, 2023. He held a significant stake of 854,635 shares, amounting to 5.32% of the company. The company expressed deep sorrow, stating his unexpected passing is an irreparable loss. Following his demise, he will cease to be part of the promoter/promoter group in compliance with SEBI regulations.

  • Advance Metering's Chairman and Whole Time Director, Pranav Kumar Ranade, passed away.
  • Mr. Ranade held 854,635 shares, representing a 5.32% stake in the company.
  • He will cease to be part of the promoter group as per SEBI regulations.
  • His sudden demise is considered an irreparable loss to the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADVANCE METERING TECHNOLOGY LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [DCXINDIA] DCX Systems & Subsidiary Bag ₹31.64 Cr Orders
item.description:
🔥 Trending

DCX Systems Ltd has announced the receipt of new purchase orders totaling approximately ₹17.45 Crores for the manufacture and supply of Cable and Wire Harness Assemblies from domestic and international customers. Concurrently, its wholly-owned subsidiary, Raneal Advanced Systems Pvt. Ltd., has also secured purchase orders amounting to about ₹14.19 Crores for the manufacture and supply of Printed Circuit Board Assemblies, also from domestic and international customers. The combined value of these orders for DCX Systems and its subsidiary is approximately ₹31.64 Crores, reflecting continued business activity and order book expansion.

  • DCX Systems received ₹17.45 Cr in orders for cable and wire harnesses.
  • Subsidiary Raneal Advanced Systems secured ₹14.19 Cr for PCB assemblies.
  • Combined new orders total approximately ₹31.64 Crores.
  • Orders are from both domestic and international customers.
  • Indicates continued business growth and order book expansion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCX Systems Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CYIENT] Cyient Board to meet Apr 23 for FY26 results, dividend, and buyback
item.description:
Cyient Ltd. has informed BSE that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Thursday, April 23, 2026. The primary agenda includes approving and taking on record the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, under Indian Accounting Standards (Ind AS). Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a final dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, if any. A significant item on the agenda is also the consideration and approval of a proposal for the buyback of equity shares of the Company, subject to obtaining all necessary statutory and regulatory approvals.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 23, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • To consider recommending a final dividend for FY26.
  • To consider a proposal for equity share buyback.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cyient Limited | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JONJUA] Jonjua Overseas registers 'JONJUA CSR TRUST' for CSR activities
item.description:
Jonjua Overseas Ltd has announced the registration of a charitable trust, 'JONJUA CSR TRUST', on April 13, 2026. This trust is established to undertake Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) activities on behalf of the company, aiming to effectively utilize CSR funds. The initiative reflects the company's commitment to sustainable and responsible corporate citizenship. The Trust will operate exclusively for charitable purposes, aligning with Schedule VII of the Companies Act, 2013, and the company's CSR Policy. Its activities will adhere to Section 135 of the Companies Act, 2013, applicable provisions of the Income Tax Act, 1961, and all other relevant statutory regulations.

  • Jonjua Overseas registered 'JONJUA CSR TRUST' on April 13, 2026.
  • Trust established to undertake Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) activities.
  • Aims to effectively utilize CSR funds and ensure compliance.
  • Aligns with company's commitment to sustainable corporate citizenship.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jonjua Overseas Ltd | Category: CSR

item.title: [NESCO] NESCO VP (Events & Exhibitions) arrested on April 13, 2026
item.description:
NESCO Ltd announced that its Vice President (Events and Exhibitions), a Senior Managerial Personnel, was taken into police custody on April 13, 2026. This action follows an unfortunate incident that occurred on April 11, 2026, during an event organized at the Nesco Exhibition Center. The company stated it is fully cooperating with the concerned authorities and currently foresees no impact on the listed entity.

  • NESCO's VP (Events & Exhibitions) arrested on April 13, 2026.
  • Arrest follows an incident at Nesco Exhibition Center on April 11, 2026.
  • Company is fully cooperating with the concerned authorities.
  • No impact on the listed entity is foreseen as of now.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NESCO LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [FINOPB] Fino Payments Bank MD & CEO Rishi Gupta unavailable over 45 days
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fino Payments Bank Ltd announced that its Managing Director & Chief Executive Officer, Mr. Rishi Gupta, has been unavailable to perform his role for over 45 days in a rolling 90-day period. This unavailability stems from a pending re-assessment of his "fit and proper" status. Mr. Gupta will resume office as MD & CEO once the Bank's Nomination and Remuneration Committee, Board of Directors, and the Reserve Bank of India complete their review. An Interim CEO was appointed with RBI's approval during this period. The Bank assured stakeholders that operations remain stable and uninterrupted. It also highlighted recent positive business momentum, including its highest-ever deposit balance in March 2026 and strong growth in its referral lending business.

  • MD & CEO Rishi Gupta unavailable for over 45 days due to fit & proper status re-assessment.
  • His return depends on review by Bank's Board and RBI approval.
  • An Interim CEO has been appointed with RBI's approval.
  • Bank assures stable, uninterrupted operations and strong business fundamentals.
  • Recent updates include record deposits and strong referral lending momentum.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fino Payments Bank Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [POONAWALLA] Poonawalla Fincorp QIP closes, allocates 67.43M shares at ₹370.75
item.description:
Poonawalla Fincorp's Committee of Directors approved the closure of its Qualified Institutions Placement (QIP) on April 13, 2026. The company allocated 67,430,883 equity shares to eligible qualified institutional buyers at an issue price of ₹370.75 per share. This price includes a premium of ₹368.75 per share and represents a 5.00% discount (₹19.51 per share) to the floor price of ₹390.26. The placement document dated April 13, 2026, was also approved and adopted. The QIP had opened on April 9, 2026, and the trading window for designated persons remains closed.

  • Poonawalla Fincorp's QIP closed on April 13, 2026.
  • 67,430,883 equity shares were allocated to QIBs.
  • Issue price set at ₹370.75 per equity share.
  • Price reflects a 5.00% discount to the floor price.
  • Placement document dated April 13, 2026, was adopted.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Poonawalla Fincorp Ltd | Category: Investment
